name.value: Thank you for your commitment to helping your fellow North Dakotans through the COVID-19 pandemic. Working together with a data-driven approach, our state has relied on personal responsibility and a balanced approach to protect the most vulnerable, preserve hospital capacity, and keep our schools and economy open.

value.value: Thank you for your commitment to helping your fellow North Dakotans through the COVID-19 pandemic. Working together with a data-driven approach, our state has relied on personal responsibility and a balanced approach to protect the most vulnerable, preserve hospital capacity, and keep our schools and economy open.

name.value: Now, with the widespread availability of safe and effective vaccines and treatments, we have new tools to fight the pandemic. We are grateful to everyone giving and receiving the vaccine to protect themselves, their loved ones and their communities.

value.value: Now, with the widespread availability of safe and effective vaccines and treatments, we have new tools to fight the pandemic. We are grateful to everyone giving and receiving the vaccine to protect themselves, their loved ones and their communities.

name.value: As we continue to navigate this unprecedented time, we encourage citizens to visit

value.value: As we continue to navigate this unprecedented time, we encourage citizens to visit

name.value: for the most comprehensive data and up-to-date information on how Team ND is addressing this pandemic through a whole-of-government, whole-of-community approach.

value.value: for the most comprehensive data and up-to-date information on how Team ND is addressing this pandemic through a whole-of-government, whole-of-community approach.

name.value: We are deeply grateful for our health care workers, long-term care staff, educators, businesses, local public health units, legislators, city and county leaders, federal partners and Team ND members in the Department of Health and other state agencies who have worked together and tirelessly to save lives and livelihoods.

value.value: We are deeply grateful for our health care workers, long-term care staff, educators, businesses, local public health units, legislators, city and county leaders, federal partners and Team ND members in the Department of Health and other state agencies who have worked together and tirelessly to save lives and livelihoods.

name.value: Welcome to North Dakota where possibility is as endless as the horizon.

value.value: Welcome to North Dakota where possibility is as endless as the horizon.

name.value: Whether you crave the rugged outdoors or thrive in urban settings, you’ll find vibrant, diverse communities and the shortest average commute time in the country, leaving you with even more time to do something meaningful and unexpected.

value.value: Whether you crave the rugged outdoors or thrive in urban settings, you’ll find vibrant, diverse communities and the shortest average commute time in the country, leaving you with even more time to do something meaningful and unexpected.

name.value: We invite you to look around and see what North Dakota has to offer.  Imagine yourself living and working here.  Know that in North Dakota, you can make a great life and a big difference.

value.value: We invite you to look around and see what North Dakota has to offer.  Imagine yourself living and working here.  Know that in North Dakota, you can make a great life and a big difference.

name.value: DISCOVER ALL THE THINGS TO DO IN NORTH DAKOTA (link sends email)

DISCOVER ALL THE THINGS
TO DO IN NORTH DAKOTA (link sends email)

name.value: Whether you're just jumping into the workforce or looking to jump-start your career, let North Dakota's booming economy be your springboard.  Positions in healthcare, technology, autonomous systems, agriculture, energy and more let us do amazing things every day.

value.value: Whether you're just jumping into the workforce or looking to jump-start your career, let North Dakota's booming economy be your springboard.  Positions in healthcare, technology, autonomous systems, agriculture, energy and more let us do amazing things every day.

name.value: With a high median wage, low state income taxes, and the chance to make a real impact, you can't help but be drawn in.  And once you're in, we're pretty sure you'll never want to go anywhere else.

value.value: With a high median wage, low state income taxes, and the chance to make a real impact, you can't help but be drawn in.  And once you're in, we're pretty sure you'll never want to go anywhere else.
